productDisplayName: Converse Men All Star Black Shoes
description: The Chuck Taylor All Star is a symbol of originality and self-expression the world over. The pioneers that put the amp;lsquo squeakamp;rsquo in Basketball have been an off-the-court favourite of rock stars and rebels for the past 60 years. Dedicated to basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse is also called Chucks, and comes in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite.UpperBlack canvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityContrast lacing for maximum style High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and for styleLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityEyelets on the lateral side for ventilationMidsoleComfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionDiamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
